testcase.name: emergencyToggleSystemConfig — 3 关键紧急开关 + emergencyApprove + postReviewRequired > stop_trending_scraper: 触发 emergencyApprove + 写 security_alert audit + 钉钉 isMock
emergencyToggleSystemConfig — 3 关键紧急开关 + emergencyApprove + postReviewRequired > stop_evolution_agent: 触发 emergencyToggleSystemConfig · _updateSystemConfigInTx 走单点
emergencyToggleSystemConfig — 3 关键紧急开关 + emergencyApprove + postReviewRequired > enable_fallback_prompt: 触发 requestApproval with emergencyMode + incidentId
emergencyToggleSystemConfig — 3 关键紧急开关 + emergencyApprove + postReviewRequired > incidentId 为空 → throw BAD_REQUEST
emergencyToggleSystemConfig — 3 关键紧急开关 + emergencyApprove + postReviewRequired > configKey 不存在 → throw NOT_FOUND
getFeatureFlagValue — 5s TTL cache + 3 flagType 路由 > boolean flagType: new_ui_feature=true → getFeatureFlagValue returns true
getFeatureFlagValue — 5s TTL cache + 3 flagType 路由 > 5s TTL cache: 第二次调用不再查 DB
getFeatureFlagValue — 5s TTL cache + 3 flagType 路由 > percentage flagType: 100% → 所有 userId 都命中
getFeatureFlagValue — 5s TTL cache + 3 flagType 路由 > targeted flagType: target_users 命中 → true
getFeatureFlagValue — 5s TTL cache + 3 flagType 路由 > targeted flagType: target_plans 命中 → true
getSystemConfigValue — 5s TTL cache > stop_evolution_agent=true → EvolutionAgent bypass 依赖此值
getSystemConfigValue — 5s TTL cache > 5s TTL cache: getSystemConfigValue 第二次调用不再查 DB
getSystemConfigValue — 5s TTL cache > stop_trending_scraper: 真实 system_config 路径 · trending-scraper worker emergency stop 依赖此值
